_meta.notes: Captured via cargo bench -p visionclaw-xr-presence --bench wire -- --warm-up-time 1 --measurement-time 3. Targets derived from PRD-008 §6: 90fps -> 11.1ms/frame; pose stack must consume <<1% of that for a 1k-node graph.

encode_pose_frame._note: PRD-008 §6 budget: wire encode <=1us/frame on Quest 3 ARM. Linux x86_64 dev baseline; Quest 3 ARM expected ~3-5x slower; CI on self-hosted Quest runner replaces this on first green run.

decode_pose_frame._note: PRD-008 §6 budget: wire decode <=1us/frame on Quest 3 ARM.

validate_pose._note: Combined velocity_gate + world_bounds + monotonic_timestamp; gate the receive loop.

delta_compute._note: PoseDelta::between two PoseFrames; runs once per outbound frame.

decode_position_frame_1k_ns._note: 1000-node 0x42 frame (28001 bytes) decode; gdext crate. Linux x86_64 dev baseline. Quest 3 ARM expected ~3-5x slower (~7-13us); still well under 1ms/frame budget.

presence_round_trip_ns._note: Full encode+decode round-trip of one PoseFrame at 0x43; runs once per outbound frame.

frame_p99_ms._note: PRD-008 G1: 90fps p99 (1000/90 = 11.111ms). Measured by Godot perf scene.

frame_p50_ms._note: Per-frame CPU+GPU sum target; PRD-008 §6 splits as <=8ms CPU AND <=8ms GPU.
